allOf.title: deviceAndAppManagementRoleAssignment

members.description: Indicates the list of role member security group Entra IDs. For example: {dec942f4-6777-4998-96b4-522e383b08e2}.

allOf.description: The Role Assignment resource. Role assignments tie together a role definition with members and scopes. There can be one or more role assignments per role. This applies to custom and built-in roles.
